raw_consumer_statement: I was sold a lab grown diamond ring listed as new on XX/XX/year> from a website called 'Whatnot '. Once I recieved item it was evident this was not a new ring, based on various scuffs and scratches. Immediately I Contacted seller to explain issue. End result was my account being banned for inquiring about a refund based on condition of item sold. I then Contacted my credit card company citi bank to submit dispute. After months of providing thorough required documentation, receipts, and email evidence, the credit was never honored in my favor. This has caused a lot of stress when trying to get credit for item falsely sold. Please help me as I've followed all steps citi bank requested.
